summary: Made two surgical seam edits to tighten adjacency: the opening now lands more directly after Chapter 16's official departure, and the exit more clearly foreshadows Mina's reassignment into a spare main-house room before Chapter 18.
edits: Anchored the opening silence to the officials leaving at the end of the previous chapter.
Sharpened the closing housing line to set up Mina's move into a spare main-house room before the next chapter.
